postprocess: direct webp q78, copied to blog source/images
prompt: A wide 16:9 hero illustration of a desktop computer scene. The top menu bar shows a cute pixel-art owl icon with a gentle wink. The screen notch area expands into a semi-transparent floating island panel with thin glowing lines and small dots representing coding agent session activity. Color palette inspired by a misty mountain lake at dawn: misty blue sky, lake cyan, deep cedar green, fog white, and a touch of soft morning gold. Nature-meets-tech atmosphere, dark gradient background, conceptual visualization, soft cinematic lighting, clean modern interface. no text, no letters, no watermark, no brand marks, no platform logos.
